name: wxcode-admin-relay-helpdesk
title: Relay Admin
description: Friendly light-mode ops admin aesthetic: near-white slate canvas (#f8fafc), violet accent (#7c3aed / #8b5cf6), status-semantic palette (green / amber / red), Inter type, soft-shadow white cards at 10px radius, fine hairline borders. Archetype = left categorised sidebar + 56px topbar with search and filter dropdown + 4 KPI cards with sparklines + priority-tier bar strip + full-width records table with dual status pills + right load panel with presence indicators. Plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this friendly violet-accent light-mode admin aesthetic to my domain — categorised sidebar, topbar with search and filter dropdown, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, priority-tier bar strip, full-width records table with dual status pills, right load panel with presence indicators, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个友好的浅色模式紫罗兰强调色管理界面应用到我的领域：分类侧边栏、带搜索和筛选下拉的顶栏、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、优先级条形条、带双状态标签的全宽记录表格、带在线状态指示器的右侧负载面板，以及配套的列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
